chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 1140 of 2018 Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 31-03-2022 Date of Decision: 31-03-2022 None present on behalf of the Petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G-Sindh. O R D E R Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner is seeking his employment in Respondents Department on the basis of plot donation. None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation is received; whereas, record reflects that this Petition is pending since 2018, but since 05.06.2018, when notices were ordered, no efforts have been made to get the matter fixed by filing application for early hearing; whereas, the controversy involved in this Petition has already been decided by the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide Order dated 09.11.2015, passed in Civil Appeals No.19-K to 50-K of 2015 (Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper and others), wherein it has been held that such appointments cannot be allowed on plot donation basis. In view of such position, instant Petition being misconceived and not maintainable is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
